title: rosa agrestis var. pubescens
intro: Rosa agrestis var. pubescens, also known as the wild rose or prickly rose, is a variety of rose plant that is native to Europe and has a hairy or pubescent appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rosa agrestis var. pubescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote healthy skin and hair. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
